story.text:
# ✨ Forge Blade
**🏃(run) → ⚡(evoke) → ⚒️(craft) → ⚔️(blade)**
*vulcana · forging · V19*

Forge a runecraft blade through the three-phase Runecraft Protocol: Run · Evoke · Craft. First production form of the Lorenz Attractor (C18-C21).

> A blade is not summoned. A blade is forged. The path through the lattice is the trace; the trace is what the blade remembers.

*Keywords:* forge · blade · runecraft · lorenz · v19 · plonkish
